meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve Debugging Struggles
content.seo_description: Learn how to implement user onboarding to overcome debugging hurdles. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code to build your first app.
content.answer_block: When you cannot debug code, your user onboarding flow is often the culprit. By implementing structured, guided walkthroughs, you isolate user inputs and prevent invalid states before they trigger crashes. Use Antigravity to scaffold these flows and Claude Code to automate the integration, turning chaotic errors into predictable, manageable user paths.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and your console is a graveyard of red text. You’ve spent hours chasing a bug that feels impossible to pin down, leaving you frustrated and questioning your path as a developer. We have all been there—staring at the monitor, feeling the weight of a broken project that just won't behave.

But here is the industry secret: most 'bugs' aren't logic errors; they are unexpected user states. By shifting your focus to high-quality user onboarding, you guide your users through your application's logic, effectively preventing them from entering the 'danger zones' where your code breaks. This isn't just about design; it is about building a robust, professional-grade technical foundation.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, map out the path a user must take to succeed. This prevents invalid state transitions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a user flow diagram for a SaaS onboarding sequence that prevents users from accessing core features before profile setup is complete.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'create a flow chart of the onboarding process in markdown'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding UI
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate clean, modular UI components for your onboarding steps, ensuring type safety from the start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React component for an onboarding modal that handles three distinct steps: Welcome, Profile Setup, and Feature Tour.

steps.title: Implement State Guardrails
steps.description: Use Claude Code to wrap your onboarding steps in state logic that prevents navigation if requirements are not met.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a state machine logic for onboarding that prevents users from clicking 'Finish' if the profile data is incomplete.

steps.title: Automate Integration Testing
steps.description: Ensure your onboarding flow doesn't break by creating automated tests that simulate user interaction patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Playwright test script that simulates a user completing the onboarding flow and verifying the final state.

steps.title: Deploy and Monitor
steps.description: Deploy your app and use logs to ensure that users are successfully navigating the onboarding without triggering errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a monitoring script that logs user progress through each onboarding step to identify drop-off points.

pro_tips: Always validate user data at the client-side boundary before sending it to your database to stop bugs at the source.
Use 'Feature Flags' during onboarding to toggle new code paths without breaking the production experience for everyone.
Treat your onboarding flow as an API; it should have strict input requirements and clear error messaging for the user.
If you can't reproduce a bug, add breadcrumb logging to your onboarding steps to track exactly what the user clicked.
Master the art of 'graceful degradation'—if a user skips a step, ensure the app defaults to a safe, non-crashing state.
content.next_steps: After completing your onboarding flow, focus on building a robust 'Empty State' for your app to handle users who haven't populated their data yet.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the strategy; now it is time to build something that lasts. Stop fighting your code and start architecting for success. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
